preserve.text: This document explains ownership with one required word present while a cat sits near the door and a dog runs in the yard. Birds sing after rain because people make tea at home and keep the room warm.
The compiler accepts borrowed values when traits describe the behavior.
The abstract uses counterfeit consciousness where artificial intelligence is intended.
The cancer paper calls the condition bosom peril in the title.
The conclusion says sign to clamor instead of signal to noise.
The paper discusses artificial intelligence methods in cancer diagnosis.
The receiver measured the signal to noise ratio before calibration.
The lab recorded public clamor after the clinical trial was suspended.
